name: air-travel-wallet-v1
description: V1 proof-of-life for flight checkout autofill, traveler vault, booking risk checks, and trip dashboard.

scripts.check: npm run build:web && tsc --noEmit && node --check apps/web/server.js && node --check apps/web/public/app.js && node --check apps/extension/src/content/content.js && node --check apps/extension/src/popup/popup.js && node --check apps/extension/src/background/service-worker.js && node --check apps/web/agent/loop.js && node --check apps/web/agent/verify-and-plan.js && node --check apps/web/agent/requirement-extractor.js && node --check apps/web/agent/policy.js && node --check apps/web/agent/session-store.js && node --check apps/web/agent/trace-store.js && node --check apps/web/agent/openai-client.js && node --check apps/web/agent/schemas.js && node --check packages/shared/agent-state/index.js && node --check packages/shared/agent-actions/index.js && node --check packages/shared/requirements/index.js && node --check packages/shared/policy/index.js
